phtclThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:31:27 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
William Keithan papers
J. Keithan, William.
28-1-4102
4.8 cubic feet. 4.8 cubic feet.
1925-1990. Photographs, printed materials. Includes photographs, printing blocks, and glass negatives (1930s) of the hotel school and campus, and files from when Keithan was dean. Collection material in English 8436169
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2014
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2014
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2015
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Received his B.S. from Cornell's School of Hotel Administration in 1950 and later served as acting dean of the school.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes photographs, printing blocks, and glass negatives (1930s) of the hotel school and campus, and files from when Keithan was dean.
Cite As:
William Keithan Papers, #28-1-4102. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Hotels. Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae. Cornell University. Class of 1950

Scope and Contents
Scenes of campus, hotel school events, classes and graduates. Some of the images were by Troy and some were taken by Howard Meek, Dean of the Hotel School, on a round the world hotel visit tourGlass Negatives:1930's6

Scenes of campus, hotel school events, classes and graduates. Some of the images were by Troy and some were taken by Howard Meek, Dean of the Hotel School, on a round the world hotel visit tourGlass Negatives:1930's7
